title: Synthetic Research Program Brief
summary: Public-safe brief for a synthetic research program about graph-assisted work.

title: Graph-Assisted Work Research
summary: Synthetic research program used to evaluate Mirai Graph-style project control.

title: Measure Context Quality
summary: Evaluate whether graph-generated context improves dependency and evidence coverage.

title: Define Baseline Protocol
summary: Define a baseline-vs-Mirai Graph comparison protocol for one synthetic task.

title: Collect Synthetic Result
summary: Record context size, missed dependencies, unsupported assumptions and evidence coverage.

title: Synthetic Result Table
summary: Synthetic metric table used for reproducibility and limitation review.

title: Overclaiming Synthetic Result
summary: Synthetic evidence may be mistaken for broad scientific proof.

title: Limit Claim To Alpha Evidence
summary: Publication wording must separate synthetic evidence, pilot evidence and scientific proof.

title: Publication Claim Review Gate
summary: Review gate before treating synthetic or pilot evidence as a publication claim.

title: Preprint Outline Ready
summary: Milestone reached when protocol, limitations and evidence boundaries are documented.

title: Research Reviewer
summary: Reviewer role responsible for checking limitations and claim boundaries.
